title: stenogyne angustifolia
intro: Stenogyne angustifolia, a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, is commonly known as Hawaiian mountain mint or narrow-leaved stenogyne. This plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stenogyne angustifolia include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improved respiratory health, making it a potential natural remedy for various ailments. Stenogyne angustifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical applications, allowing for various methods of consumption and use.
